/usr/bin/ar qc libvdpau_va_gl_static.a "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-bitmap-surface.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-csc-matrix.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-device.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-output-surface.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-presentation-queue.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-video-decoder.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-video-mixer.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-video-surface.c.o" CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/entry.c.o CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/trace.c.o "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/reverse-constant.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/handle-storage.c.o" CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/bitstream.c.o "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/h264-parse.c.o" CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/globals.c.o CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/watermark.c.o "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/ctx-stack.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libvdpau_va_gl_static.a
